findings.description: Section s3 merges two distinct source headings — "入力値のトリム" and "様々なMapオブジェクトの精査と変換" — into a single section. These cover unrelated topics: the first is about whitespace trimming of string/numeric inputs during validation, while the second is about validating arbitrary Map objects (including SqlRow). The merger is surfaced by an embedded `## 様々なMapオブジェクトの精査と変換` heading inside the section body, which is an unusual pattern. All content is preserved and hints cover both topics, but the two topics would be better separated for retrieval accuracy.
findings.source_evidence: Source has a standalone heading "様々なMapオブジェクトの精査と変換" (underlined with `=====`) as a distinct section between "入力値のトリム" and "SqlRowをインプットとして精査を行う例". Knowledge file has only 5 sections (s1–s5) covering 6 source headings.
